ayat.arabic_uthmani: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلذَّٰرِيَـٰتِ ذَرْوًا
ayat.english: By those that winnow with a winnowing

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَٱلْحَـٰمِلَـٰتِ وِقْرًا
ayat.english: And those that bear the burden (of the rain)

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَٱلْجَـٰرِيَـٰتِ يُسْرًا
ayat.english: And those that glide with ease (upon the sea)

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَٱلْمُقَسِّمَـٰتِ أَمْرًا
ayat.english: And those who distribute (blessings) by command,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَصَادِقٌ
ayat.english: Lo! that wherewith ye are threatened is indeed true,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَإِنَّ ٱلدِّينَ لَوَٰقِعٌ
ayat.english: And lo! the judgment will indeed befall.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلْحُبُكِ
ayat.english: By the heaven full of paths,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّكُمْ لَفِى قَوْلٍ مُّخْتَلِفٍ
ayat.english: Lo! ye, forsooth, are of various opinion (concerning the truth).

ayat.arabic_uthmani: يُؤْفَكُ عَنْهُ مَنْ أُفِكَ
ayat.english: He is made to turn away from it who is (himself) averse.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: قُتِلَ ٱلْخَرَّٰصُونَ
ayat.english: Accursed be the conjecturers

ayat.arabic_uthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى غَمْرَةٍ سَاهُونَ
ayat.english: Who are careless in an abyss!

ayat.arabic_uthmani: يَسْـَٔلُونَ أَيَّانَ يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
ayat.english: They ask: When is the Day of Judgment?

ayat.arabic_uthmani: يَوْمَ هُمْ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ يُفْتَنُونَ
ayat.english: (It is) the day when they will be tormented at the Fire,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: ذُوقُوا۟ فِتْنَتَكُمْ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
ayat.english: (And it will be said unto them): Taste your torment (which ye inflicted). This is what ye sought to hasten.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
ayat.english: Lo! those who keep from evil will dwell amid gardens and watersprings,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: ءَاخِذِينَ مَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَبْلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُحْسِنِينَ
ayat.english: Taking that which their Lord giveth them; for lo! aforetime they were doers of good;

ayat.arabic_uthmani: كَانُوا۟ قَلِيلًا مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ مَا يَهْجَعُونَ
ayat.english: They used to sleep but little of the night,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَبِٱلْأَسْحَارِ هُمْ يَسْتَغْفِرُونَ
ayat.english: And ere the dawning of each day would seek forgiveness,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَفِىٓ أَمْوَٰلِهِمْ حَقٌّ لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلْمَحْرُومِ
ayat.english: And in their wealth the beggar and the outcast had due share.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَفِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ءَايَـٰتٌ لِّلْمُوقِنِينَ
ayat.english: And in the earth are portents for those whose faith is sure.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَفِىٓ أَنفُسِكُمْ ۚ أَفَلَا تُبْصِرُونَ
ayat.english: And (also) in yourselves. Can ye then not see?

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَفِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ رِزْقُكُمْ وَمَا تُوعَدُونَ
ayat.english: And in the heaven is your providence and that which ye are promised;

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَوَرَبِّ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِنَّهُۥ لَحَقٌّ مِّثْلَ مَآ أَنَّكُمْ تَنطِقُونَ
ayat.english: And by the Lord of the heavens and the earth, it is the truth, even as (it is true) that ye speak.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ضَيْفِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ ٱلْمُكْرَمِينَ
ayat.english: Hath the story of Abraham's honoured guests reached thee (O Muhammad)?

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِذْ دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِ فَقَالُوا۟ سَلَـٰمًا ۖ قَالَ سَلَـٰمٌ قَوْمٌ مُّنكَرُونَ
ayat.english: When they came in unto him and said: Peace! he answered, Peace! (and thought): Folk unknown (to me).

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ فَجَآءَ بِعِجْلٍ سَمِينٍ
ayat.english: Then he went apart unto his housefolk so that they brought a fatted calf;

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَقَرَّبَهُۥٓ إِلَيْهِمْ قَالَ أَلَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayat.english: And he set it before them, saying: Will ye not eat?

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَأَوْجَسَ مِنْهُمْ خِيفَةً ۖ قَالُوا۟ لَا تَخَفْ ۖ وَبَشَّرُوهُ بِغُلَـٰمٍ عَلِيمٍ
ayat.english: Then he conceived a fear of them. They said: Fear not! and gave him tidings of (the birth of) a wise son.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَأَقْبَلَتِ ٱمْرَأَتُهُۥ فِى صَرَّةٍ فَصَكَّتْ وَجْهَهَا وَقَالَتْ عَجُوزٌ عَقِيمٌ
ayat.english: Then his wife came forward, making moan, and smote her face, and cried: A barren old woman!

ayat.arabic_uthmani: قَالُوا۟ كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْحَكِيمُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayat.english: They said: Even so saith thy Lord. Lo! He is the Wise, the Knower.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: ۞ قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
ayat.english: (Abraham) said: And (afterward) what is your errand, O ye sent (from Allah)?

ayat.arabic_uthmani: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ أُرْسِلْنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍ مُّجْرِمِينَ
ayat.english: They said: Lo! we are sent unto a guilty folk,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: لِنُرْسِلَ عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةً مِّن طِينٍ
ayat.english: That we may send upon them stones of clay,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: مُّسَوَّمَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلْمُسْرِفِينَ
ayat.english: Marked by thy Lord for (the destruction of) the wanton.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَأَخْرَجْنَا مَن كَانَ فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayat.english: Then we brought forth such believers as were there.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَمَا وَجَدْنَا فِيهَا غَيْرَ بَيْتٍ مِّنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
ayat.english: But We found there but one house of those surrendered (to Allah).

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَتَرَكْنَا فِيهَآ ءَايَةً لِّلَّذِينَ يَخَافُونَ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَلِيمَ
ayat.english: And We left behind therein a portent for those who fear a painful doom.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَفِى مُوسَىٰٓ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَـٰهُ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayat.english: And in Moses (too, there is a portent) when We sent him unto Pharaoh with clear warrant,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَتَوَلَّىٰ بِرُكْنِهِۦ وَقَالَ سَـٰحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ
ayat.english: But he withdrew (confiding) in his might, and said: A wizard or a madman.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَأَخَذْنَـٰهُ وَجُنُودَهُۥ فَنَبَذْنَـٰهُمْ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ وَهُوَ مُلِيمٌ
ayat.english: So We seized him and his hosts and flung them in the sea, for he was reprobate.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَفِى عَادٍ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلرِّيحَ ٱلْعَقِيمَ
ayat.english: And in (the tribe of) A'ad (there is a portent) when we sent the fatal wind against them.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: مَا تَذَرُ مِن شَىْءٍ أَتَتْ عَلَيْهِ إِلَّا جَعَلَتْهُ كَٱلرَّمِيمِ
ayat.english: It spared naught that it reached, but made it (all) as dust.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَفِى ثَمُودَ إِذْ قِيلَ لَهُمْ تَمَتَّعُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
ayat.english: And in (the tribe of) Thamud (there is a portent) when it was told them: Take your ease awhile.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَعَتَوْا۟ عَنْ أَمْرِ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّـٰعِقَةُ وَهُمْ يَنظُرُونَ
ayat.english: But they rebelled against their Lord's decree, and so the thunderbolt overtook them even while they gazed;

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَمَا ٱسْتَطَـٰعُوا۟ مِن قِيَامٍ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُنتَصِرِينَ
ayat.english: And they were unable to rise up, nor could they help themselves.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍ مِّن قَبْلُ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا فَـٰسِقِينَ
ayat.english: And the folk of Noah aforetime. Lo! they were licentious folk.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بَنَيْنَـٰهَا بِأَيْي۟دٍ وَإِنَّا لَمُوسِعُونَ
ayat.english: We have built the heaven with might, and We it is Who make the vast extent (thereof).

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَٱلْأَرْضَ فَرَشْنَـٰهَا فَنِعْمَ ٱلْمَـٰهِدُونَ
ayat.english: And the earth have We laid out, how gracious is the Spreader (thereof)!

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَمِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَا زَوْجَيْنِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayat.english: And all things We have created by pairs, that haply ye may reflect.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَفِرُّوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayat.english: Therefor flee unto Allah; lo! I am a plain warner unto you from him.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَلَا تَجْعَلُوا۟ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayat.english: And set not any other god along with Allah; lo! I am a plain warner unto you from Him.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: كَذَٰلِكَ مَآ أَتَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا قَالُوا۟ سَاحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ
ayat.english: Even so there came no messenger unto those before them but they said: A wizard or a madman!

ayat.arabic_uthmani: أَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِهِۦ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ
ayat.english: Have they handed down (the saying) as an heirloom one unto another? Nay, but they are froward folk.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِمَلُومٍ
ayat.english: So withdraw from them (O Muhammad), for thou art in no wise blameworthy,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَذَكِّرْ فَإِنَّ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ تَنفَعُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayat.english: And warn, for warning profiteth believers.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَمَا خَلَقْتُ ٱلْجِنَّ وَٱلْإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُونِ
ayat.english: I created the jinn and humankind only that they might worship Me.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: مَآ أُرِيدُ مِنْهُم مِّن رِّزْقٍ وَمَآ أُرِيدُ أَن يُطْعِمُونِ
ayat.english: I seek no livelihood from them, nor do I ask that they should feed Me.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلرَّزَّاقُ ذُو ٱلْقُوَّةِ ٱلْمَتِينُ
ayat.english: Lo! Allah! He it is that giveth livelihood, the Lord of unbreakable might.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ ذَنُوبًا مِّثْلَ ذَنُوبِ أَصْحَـٰبِهِمْ فَلَا يَسْتَعْجِلُونِ
ayat.english: And lo! for those who (now) do wrong there is an evil day like unto the evil day (which came for) their likes (of old); so let them not ask Me to hasten on (that day).

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَوَيْلٌ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن يَوْمِهِمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ
ayat.english: And woe unto those who disbelieve, from (that) their day which they are promised.
